title: ilex ciliolata
intro: Ilex ciliolata, also known as the Japanese holly, is a species of holly native to East Asia. The leaves and fruits of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ilex ciliolata include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and preventing certain types of cancer, among others. The plant is often prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to take advantage of its medicinal properties, and its leaves can also be dried and used in herbal capsules or tinctures.
